plays.playDescription:
(:29) (No Huddle, Shotgun) T.Brady pass deep left to B.Cooks for 25 yards, TOUCHDOWN [J.Clowney]. NE 12-Brady 6th career game with 5+ TD passes, ties Marino for 3rd most all-time. NE 12-Brady 6th career game with 5+ TD passes & no interceptions, 2nd-most all-time (Brees 7).
The Replay Official reviewed the pass completion ruling, and the play was Upheld. The ruling on the field stands.
